Thank you for submitting a pull request!

- Link to the issue it closes (or create one first).
- Fill in the sections below; delete the sections that don't apply.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1–3 sentences describing the motivation and the change. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test-only
- [ ] CI / packaging

## How was this tested?

<!--
Describe which tests you ran (unit / integration / OpenFOAM) and any manual
verification.  If this touches CFD, include the BO / validation log paths.
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff format` and `ruff check` pass locally
- [ ] `mypy ooc_optimizer` passes locally
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally (non-OpenFOAM tests)
- [ ] I have updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] I have updated any relevant documentation (`docs/`, module docstrings)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or large binary artefacts are committed
